text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Windy, happy birthday! I brought Air Groove 
along to celebrate too!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Guh, I appreciate it, but also why?! 
You brought the scariest person imaginable!!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Windy, you tried biting into the academy 
gates again, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, you are forgiven. Just this once. 
I'll turn a blind eye on account of it being 
your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Is… is this real life?! Hold on, 
this could be my big chance!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove… I'm the one who trampled your 
flower bed! It happened when Taiki and I were 
playing tag.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Usually I do it on purpose, but that time, 
just that once, it was an accident! Sooo…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Why, you little… Well, it's your special day. 
As long as you're sorry, I'll look past that too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Today, you take another step toward being 
an adult — one who doesn't cause trouble 
for others, yes?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yeah… Uh-huh! Might be impossible, 
but I promise!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's great, Windy! You even got us off 
the hook for the flower bed incident — that's 
double happiness!☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: About the flower bed… I never said I'd let you off the hook, Taiki.
